text.text: 📉 *Dip detected — zero traffic for 2 consecutive days (Jun 23–24); baseline below 30-session alert threshold*

*Signals*
• *What:* 0 sessions, 0 users, 0 page views on Jun 24 (and Jun 23). Last Wednesday Jun 17 had 29 sessions, 26 users, 44 page views — a 100% WoW drop.
  *So what:* Two consecutive zero-traffic days. At this early stage (sub-30 daily sessions), occasional zeros are within expected noise, but two in a row may indicate a GA4 tracking disruption or a site issue since the weekend.
  *Now what:* Open GA4 Debugger or the Network tab to confirm the tracking tag fires on `/`. If Jun 25 data also shows zero, escalate to a ticket.

_No ticket — signals are informational only (baseline 29 sessions < 30-session alert floor)_
